sections.heading: All ponies. Start here.
sections.subheading: Sale ponies, lease ponies, show dates, catch rides, shipping leads, rail talk, and pony stories in one place.

sections.title: Where pony people connect
sections.body:
This is the space between the warm up ring and the in gate.
Where deals happen, plans come together, and stories travel faster than the horses.
Find your next pony, your next ride, or your next step forward.

sections.heading: Built from pony people, not platform people.

sections.title: People trust people, not platforms.
